seoTitle: Jianghai Capacitor Products | Aluminum Electrolytic, Film, Supercapacitors | BeiLuo
seoDescription: Jianghai capacitor product catalog: Aluminum electrolytic capacitors (screw terminal, snap-in, radial lead), film capacitors (DC-Link, filter), supercapacitors. Technical support, selection guidance, sample application.

faqs.question: What series does Jianghai aluminum electrolytic capacitors have?
faqs.answer: Jianghai aluminum electrolytic capacitors are mainly divided into two categories: 1) Large industrial capacitors: CD139 series (screw terminal type, 1000uF-20000uF, 400V-600V), CD135 series (snap-in type, 100uF-10000uF, 200V-600V); 2) Small consumer capacitors: CD11 series (radial lead type, 0.1uF-10000uF, 6.3V-500V), CD26 series (SMD type, 0.1uF-1000uF, 6.3V-100V). Different series are optimized for different application scenarios.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our sales team to select the appropriate series based on your application requirements, voltage, and capacitance needs.

faqs.question: What are the characteristics of Jianghai film capacitors?
faqs.answer: Jianghai film capacitors use metallized polypropylene film technology with main features: 1) Low ESR and ESL, suitable for high-frequency applications; 2) Self-healing characteristics for high reliability; 3) Long lifespan, up to 100,000+ hours; 4) Wide temperature range, -40C to +105C; 5) Good capacitance stability, tolerance +/-5%, +/-10%. Main products include DC-Link capacitors (for PV inverters, inverters), filter capacitors (for power filtering), and snubber capacitors (for IGBT protection).
faqs.decisionGuide: Explore our film capacitor selection for high-reliability applications requiring long lifespan and low ESR performance.

faqs.question: What are the technical specifications of Jianghai supercapacitors?
faqs.answer: Jianghai supercapacitor main technical parameters: 1) EDLC: Voltage 2.7V-3.0V, capacitance 1F-3000F, ESR 0.3mOhm-200Ohm, cycle life 500,000+ cycles; 2) Lithium-ion capacitors: Voltage 3.8V, capacitance 100F-1000F, energy density 3-4x higher than EDLC, operating temperature -40C to +65C. Jianghai supercapacitors feature high power density (up to 10kW/kg), fast charge/discharge (seconds), and environmental-friendly.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our FAE team for supercapacitor sizing and application design support for your energy storage requirements.

faqs.question: How to calculate the expected lifespan of Jianghai capacitors?
faqs.answer: Jianghai aluminum electrolytic capacitor lifespan calculation formula: Lx = L0 x 2^((T0-Tx)/10) x (V0/Vx)^n. Where L0 is rated lifespan (hours), T0 is rated temperature (usually 85C or 105C), Tx is actual working temperature, V0 is rated voltage, Vx is actual working voltage, n is voltage coefficient (usually 2-3). Example: CD139 series rated lifespan 10,000 hours at 85C, actual working temperature 65C, then expected lifespan is approximately 40,000 hours. Film capacitors and supercapacitors have longer lifespans, typically 10+ years.
faqs.decisionGuide: Use our online lifespan calculator or request FAE support for detailed lifespan analysis based on your operating conditions.

categories.name: Large Aluminum Electrolytic Capacitors
categories.description: Industrial-grade large aluminum electrolytic capacitors, screw terminal and snap-in types
categories.longDescription: Jianghai large aluminum electrolytic capacitors are designed for industrial applications, including screw terminal type (CD139 series) and snap-in type (CD135 series). Products feature high capacitance, high ripple current, and long lifespan, widely used in industrial inverters, photovoltaic inverters, UPS power supplies, welding machines, and more. As an authorized Jianghai distributor, we provide comprehensive technical support and selection guidance. As an authorized distributor, we provide comprehensive Large Aluminum Electrolytic Capacitors selection guidance (选型指导) and technical support.
categories.selectionGuide: For large aluminum electrolytic capacitor selection: Rated voltage should be greater than or equal to 1.25x working voltage, capacitance calculated based on ripple current and voltage fluctuation, ripple current must meet actual application requirements, lifespan selected based on working temperature.

products.shortDescription: Jianghai CD139 series screw terminal aluminum electrolytic capacitor, 10000uF/450V, high ripple current, long lifespa...
descriptionParagraphs: CD139 10000uF/450V is an industrial-grade screw terminal aluminum electrolytic capacitor from Jianghai, using high-quality electrolyte and aluminum foil with excellent electrical performance and reliability.

Product rated voltage 450V, nominal capacitance 10000uF, ripple current up to 15A at 85C, equivalent series resistance (ESR) as low as 15mOhm. Rated lifespan 10,000 hours at 85C, operating temperature range -40C to +85C.

Widely used in industrial inverter DC-link, photovoltaic inverters, high-power switching power supplies. Screw terminal design for easy installation and maintenance, safety vent design for overvoltage protection.

faeReview.author: Jianghai FAE Team
faeReview.content: CD139 series is Jianghai's main industrial capacitor product, performing excellently in inverter applications. 10000uF/450V specification is suitable for 30-55kW inverter DC-link applications. Recommend parallel connection to reduce ESR and increase ripple current capability. Note to maintain appropriate spacing during installation for heat dissipation.
faeReview.highlight: High ripple current 15A, long lifespan 10,000 hours, suitable for inverter applications

faqs.question: What is the ripple current capability of CD139 10000uF/450V?
faqs.answer: CD139 10000uF/450V has a ripple current capability of up to 15A at 85C. This high ripple current makes it ideal for inverter DC-link applications where high-frequency ripple currents are present. For higher ripple current requirements, multiple capacitors can be connected in parallel to increase the total ripple current capability while reducing the equivalent series resistance (ESR).
faqs.decisionGuide: For applications requiring higher ripple current, consider paralleling multiple CD139 capacitors or contact our FAE team for custom solutions.

faqs.question: What is the expected lifespan of CD139 10000uF/450V at different temperatures?
faqs.answer: CD139 10000uF/450V has a rated lifespan of 10,000 hours at 85C. Using the Arrhenius equation for electrolytic capacitors, the lifespan doubles for every 10C decrease in temperature. At 65C operating temperature, the expected lifespan is approximately 40,000 hours. At 45C, the lifespan extends to about 160,000 hours (18+ years).
faqs.decisionGuide: Ensure proper heat dissipation in your design to maximize capacitor lifespan. Use our lifespan calculator for precise estimates.

faqs.question: What are the mounting requirements for CD139 screw terminal capacitors?
faqs.answer: CD139 series uses M5 or M6 screw terminals depending on the specific model. Mounting torque should be 1.5-2.0 Nm for M5 and 2.0-2.5 Nm for M6. Over-tightening can damage the capacitor seal, while under-tightening may cause poor electrical contact. The safety vent should be positioned at the top (12 o'clock position) to allow proper pressure release if overvoltage occurs.
faqs.decisionGuide: Use a calibrated torque wrench for installation and ensure proper ventilation around the capacitor for heat dissipation.

alternativeParts.comparison: Smaller capacitance, suitable for lower power applications

recommendedCompanionParts.description: High voltage balancing resistor for series capacitor configurations, ensures voltage equalization
Safety discharge resistor for DC-Link capacitor bank, ensures safe voltage discharge after power-off
Precision NTC thermistor for capacitor temperature monitoring and thermal protection

products.name: Large Aluminum Electrolytic Capacitors CD139 10000uF/450V

products.shortDescription: Jianghai CD135 series snap-in aluminum electrolytic capacitor, 4700uF/400V, compact design, high reliability.
descriptionParagraphs: CD135 4700uF/400V is a snap-in aluminum electrolytic capacitor from Jianghai with compact design, suitable for space-constrained industrial applications. Snap-in mounting for easy PCB soldering and automated production.

Product rated voltage 400V, nominal capacitance 4700uF, ripple current up to 8.5A at 85C, equivalent series resistance (ESR) approximately 25mOhm. Rated lifespan 8,000 hours at 85C, operating temperature range -40C to +85C.

Suitable for small to medium power inverters, industrial power supplies, medical equipment, test instruments. Compared to screw terminal type, snap-in type has smaller size, better cost, suitable for mass production applications.

faeReview.author: Jianghai FAE Team
faeReview.content: CD135 series snap-in capacitors are widely used in industrial power supplies. 4700uF/400V specification is suitable for 15-30kW inverters or 5-10kW switching power supplies. Snap-in design facilitates wave and reflow soldering, suitable for automated production. Recommend reserving sufficient heat dissipation space in PCB layout.
faeReview.highlight: Compact design, snap-in mounting, suitable for automated production

faqs.question: What is the difference between CD135 and CD139 series?
faqs.answer: CD135 series uses snap-in mounting suitable for PCB assembly and automated production, while CD139 series uses screw terminals for chassis mounting. CD135 is more compact and cost-effective for medium power applications (15-30kW), while CD139 offers higher ripple current and easier field maintenance for high-power applications (30-75kW). Both series offer similar voltage ratings and lifespan characteristics.
faqs.decisionGuide: Choose CD135 for PCB-mounted applications and cost-sensitive designs. Choose CD139 for chassis mounting and high-ripple current requirements.

faqs.question: What are the PCB layout recommendations for CD135 snap-in capacitors?
faqs.answer: CD135 snap-in capacitors require proper PCB layout for optimal performance and lifespan. Recommended practices: 1) Keep capacitor away from heat-generating components (IGBTs, inductors); 2) Maintain minimum 10mm spacing between capacitors for airflow; 3) Use adequate copper area for heat dissipation; 4) Ensure proper hole size (6.5mm diameter for standard snap-in); 5) Consider vibration resistance in high-vibration environments.
faqs.decisionGuide: Follow our PCB layout guidelines or contact FAE for design review to ensure optimal capacitor performance.

alternativeParts.useCase: Medium to large inverters, industrial power supplies

recommendedCompanionParts.description: High voltage balancing resistor for series capacitor configurations, ensures voltage equalization
Low-inductance film capacitor for IGBT snubber circuits, suppresses switching transients
Safety discharge resistor for DC-Link capacitor bank, ensures safe voltage discharge

products.name: Large Aluminum Electrolytic Capacitors CD135 4700uF/400V

categories.name: Small Aluminum Electrolytic Capacitors
categories.description: Consumer-grade small aluminum electrolytic capacitors, radial lead and SMD types
categories.longDescription: Jianghai small aluminum electrolytic capacitors include radial lead type (CD11 series) and SMD type (CD26 series), capacitance range 0.1uF-10000uF, voltage 6.3V-500V. Products feature small size, long lifespan, and high reliability, widely used in consumer electronics, communication equipment, automotive electronics, LED lighting, and more. As an authorized distributor, we provide comprehensive Small Aluminum Electrolytic Capacitors selection guidance (选型指导) and technical support.
categories.selectionGuide: For small aluminum electrolytic capacitor selection: Rated voltage should be greater than or equal to 1.25x working voltage, capacitance selected based on circuit requirements, dimensions must fit PCB layout, lifespan selected based on equipment service life.

products.shortDescription: Jianghai CD11 series radial lead aluminum electrolytic capacitor, 1000uF/25V, 8x16mm, long lifespan design.
descriptionParagraphs: CD11 1000uF/25V is a standard radial lead aluminum electrolytic capacitor from Jianghai, size 8mm (diameter) x 16mm (height), suitable for various consumer electronics and power applications.

Product rated voltage 25V, nominal capacitance 1000uF, ripple current 850mA at 105C, equivalent series resistance (ESR) approximately 0.15Ohm. Rated lifespan 5,000 hours at 105C, operating temperature range -40C to +105C.

Widely used in power adapters, LED driver power supplies, TVs, monitors, audio equipment. Standard lead spacing 3.5mm for easy PCB mounting. 105C long lifespan version available for high-temperature environments.

faeReview.author: Jianghai FAE Team
faeReview.content: CD11 1000uF/25V is a classic specification for power filtering, widely used in 12V/24V power adapters. 1000uF capacitance effectively filters low-frequency ripple, 8x16mm size is compact. Recommend paralleling with 0.1uF ceramic capacitor for high-frequency noise filtering. 105C version suitable for enclosed or high-temperature environments.
faeReview.highlight: Classic specification, long lifespan 5,000 hours at 105C, widely used

faqs.question: Why should I parallel a ceramic capacitor with CD11 1000uF/25V?
faqs.answer: Aluminum electrolytic capacitors like CD11 1000uF/25V have excellent low-frequency filtering capability but higher ESL (equivalent series inductance) which limits high-frequency performance. Paralleling with a 0.1uF ceramic capacitor provides: 1) Low ESL for high-frequency noise suppression; 2) Lower impedance across a wider frequency range; 3) Better handling of switching transients from SMPS. The ceramic capacitor should be placed as close as possible to the load or switching device.
faqs.decisionGuide: For switching power supplies, always parallel electrolytic capacitors with ceramic capacitors for optimal filtering across all frequencies.

faqs.question: What is the lead spacing and mounting orientation for CD11 1000uF/25V?
faqs.answer: CD11 1000uF/25V (8x16mm) has a standard lead spacing of 3.5mm (0.138 inches). The negative terminal is identified by a colored stripe on the capacitor body and shorter lead. Proper mounting orientation: 1) Observe polarity - reverse polarity will damage the capacitor; 2) Maintain minimum 3mm clearance from PCB for 105C rated parts; 3) For vertical mounting, ensure adequate headroom (16mm height); 4) Horizontal mounting possible with formed leads.
faqs.decisionGuide: Always verify polarity before soldering. Use polarity markings on PCB silkscreen to prevent assembly errors.

recommendedCompanionParts.description: High-frequency decoupling capacitor for parallel connection, filters switching noise
Secondary filter capacitor for multi-stage filtering, improves ripple rejection
Inrush current limiting resistor for soft-start circuits, protects capacitor and rectifier

products.name: Small Aluminum Electrolytic Capacitors CD11 1000uF/25V

products.shortDescription: Jianghai CD26 series SMD aluminum electrolytic capacitor, 100uF/16V, 6.3x5.4mm, SMD package.
descriptionParagraphs: CD26 100uF/16V is an SMD aluminum electrolytic capacitor from Jianghai, size 6.3mm (diameter) x 5.4mm (height), SMD package suitable for automated SMT production.

Product rated voltage 16V, nominal capacitance 100uF, ripple current 160mA at 105C, equivalent series resistance (ESR) approximately 0.8Ohm. Rated lifespan 2,000 hours at 105C, operating temperature range -55C to +105C.

Suitable for phone chargers, tablets, laptops, communication modules, automotive electronics requiring SMT processes. Compared to radial lead type, SMD type is more suitable for automated production, saving labor costs.

faeReview.author: Jianghai FAE Team
faeReview.content: CD26 SMD series is widely used in consumer electronics. 100uF/16V is a common specification for 5V power filtering, 6.3x5.4mm size meets standard packages. Recommend reflow peak temperature not exceeding 260C, time not exceeding 10 seconds. Suitable for high-density PCB layout, but pay attention to heat dissipation conditions.
faeReview.highlight: SMD package, suitable for automated production, saves labor costs

faqs.question: What are the reflow soldering recommendations for CD26 SMD capacitors?
faqs.answer: CD26 SMD aluminum electrolytic capacitors require careful reflow profile control: 1) Preheat: 150-180C for 60-120 seconds; 2) Peak temperature: Maximum 260C for standard series, 250C for long-life series; 3) Time above 217C: Maximum 60 seconds; 4) Time above 250C: Maximum 10 seconds. Excessive temperature or time can damage the capacitor seal and electrolyte. For wave soldering, maximum 270C for 3 seconds on leads only.
faqs.decisionGuide: Follow recommended reflow profiles and avoid exposing capacitors to excessive heat. Consider hand soldering for repair applications.

faqs.question: What are the advantages of CD26 SMD over CD11 radial lead capacitors?
faqs.answer: CD26 SMD series offers several advantages: 1) Automated SMT assembly reduces labor costs and improves consistency; 2) Smaller PCB footprint - no through-holes required; 3) Better high-frequency performance due to shorter internal leads; 4) Suitable for double-sided PCB designs; 5) Better vibration resistance for automotive applications. However, CD11 offers higher capacitance values and better heat dissipation through leads.
faqs.decisionGuide: Choose CD26 for high-volume consumer electronics and space-constrained designs. Choose CD11 for higher capacitance needs and better thermal performance.

recommendedCompanionParts.description: Mid-frequency decoupling capacitor for SMD applications, complements electrolytic
High-frequency bypass capacitor for IC decoupling, placed close to load
Transient voltage suppression diode for input protection, clamps voltage spikes

products.name: Small Aluminum Electrolytic Capacitors CD26 100uF/16V

categories.name: Film Capacitors
categories.description: Metallized polypropylene film capacitors for DC-Link, filtering, and snubber applications
categories.longDescription: Jianghai film capacitors use metallized polypropylene film technology with low ESR, low ESL, self-healing characteristics, and long lifespan. Main products include DC-Link capacitors (for PV inverters, inverter DC-link), filter capacitors (for power filtering), and snubber capacitors (for IGBT protection). Voltage range 450V-1500V, capacitance range 1uF-500uF. As an authorized distributor, we provide comprehensive Film Capacitors selection guidance (选型指导) and technical support.
categories.selectionGuide: For film capacitor selection: Rated voltage should be greater than or equal to 1.1x working voltage, capacitance calculated based on ripple current and voltage fluctuation, dv/dt must meet IGBT switching speed, ESR and ESL must meet high-frequency application requirements.

products.shortDescription: Jianghai DC-Link film capacitor, 100uF/800V, low ESR, high ripple current, for PV inverters.
descriptionParagraphs: Jianghai DC-Link 100uF/800V is a metallized polypropylene film capacitor designed for photovoltaic inverters and industrial inverters. Uses cylindrical aluminum case with environmental resin filling for excellent heat dissipation and reliability.

Product rated voltage 800VDC, nominal capacitance 100uF, max ripple current up to 25Arms at 70C, dv/dt up to 100V/us, ESR as low as 2mOhm, ESL less than 20nH. Insulation resistance greater than or equal to 30000MOhm, expected lifespan 100,000 hours at 70C.

Compared to aluminum electrolytic capacitors, film capacitors have longer lifespan, lower ESR, better high-frequency characteristics, especially suitable for PV inverters requiring 20+ year lifespan. Self-healing characteristics ensure automatic recovery after local breakdown, improving system reliability.

faeReview.author: Jianghai FAE Team
faeReview.content: DC-Link film capacitors are Jianghai's key products, with obvious trend replacing aluminum electrolytic capacitors in PV inverters. 100uF/800V is suitable for 10-20kW single-phase or three-phase inverters. Recommend working voltage not exceeding 720V (90% of rated voltage) to ensure long lifespan. Note to use appropriate torque during installation to avoid mechanical stress.
faeReview.highlight: Long lifespan 100,000 hours, low ESR 2mOhm, suitable for PV inverters

faqs.question: How does the self-healing mechanism work in DC-Link film capacitors?
faqs.answer: Jianghai DC-Link film capacitors use metallized polypropylene film with self-healing properties. When a localized dielectric breakdown occurs due to overvoltage or defect, the thin metal electrode (typically 10-50nm thick) around the breakdown point vaporizes due to the arc energy, effectively isolating the defect. This creates a small cleared area (typically <1mm) without catastrophic failure. The capacitor continues operating with slightly reduced capacitance (typically <0.1% per event). This is a major advantage over aluminum electrolytic capacitors which can fail short-circuit.
faqs.decisionGuide: Self-healing makes film capacitors ideal for high-reliability applications where maintenance access is difficult, such as PV inverters and remote installations.

faqs.question: What is the maximum dv/dt rating and why is it important for DC-Link 100uF/800V?
faqs.answer: DC-Link 100uF/800V has a dv/dt rating of 100V/us (volts per microsecond). This parameter is critical because: 1) High dv/dt from IGBT switching can damage capacitors with insufficient ratings; 2) Excessive dv/dt causes partial discharges and corona effects, degrading the dielectric; 3) The ESL (equivalent series inductance) combined with high dv/dt creates voltage spikes. For IGBT applications with switching speeds of 5-50kHz, ensure the capacitor dv/dt rating exceeds the actual circuit dv/dt by at least 20% margin.
faqs.decisionGuide: For high-frequency IGBT applications, select capacitors with appropriate dv/dt ratings. Contact FAE for dv/dt calculations based on your switching characteristics.

faqs.question: What are the installation torque requirements for DC-Link film capacitors?
faqs.answer: DC-Link film capacitors with threaded studs require proper mounting torque: 1) M8 thread: 3.0-4.0 Nm; 2) M12 thread: 8.0-10.0 Nm. Over-tightening can deform the case, damage internal connections, or crack the resin fill. Under-tightening may cause poor electrical contact and overheating at the connection. Always use a calibrated torque wrench and follow the specific torque values in the datasheet for your capacitor model.
faqs.decisionGuide: Use calibrated torque tools for installation. Consider spring washers to maintain contact pressure under thermal cycling.

alternativeParts.comparison: Smaller capacitance, suitable for lower power
Larger capacitance, suitable for higher power

recommendedCompanionParts.description: High voltage discharge resistor for DC-Link safety, ensures stored energy dissipation
High dv/dt snubber capacitor for IGBT protection, suppresses turn-off voltage spikes
1200V/450A IGBT module for inverter power stage, compatible with DC-Link capacitor

products.name: Film Capacitors DC-Link 100uF/800V

products.shortDescription: Jianghai IGBT snubber capacitor, 0.47uF/1200V, low inductance design, suppresses switching spikes.
descriptionParagraphs: Jianghai snubber capacitors are specially designed for IGBT switching protection, using metallized polypropylene film and special low-inductance structure to effectively suppress voltage spikes during IGBT turn-off, protecting power devices.

Product rated voltage 1200VDC, nominal capacitance 0.47uF, dv/dt up to 3000V/us, ESL less than 10nH. Uses flat or cylindrical package, can be installed directly near IGBT modules to minimize loop inductance. Operating temperature range -40C to +105C.

Widely used in industrial inverters, photovoltaic inverters, electric vehicle drives, welding machines, and other high-power power electronic equipment. Combined with resistors to form RC snubber circuits, can effectively suppress turn-off overvoltage, reduce EMI, and improve system reliability.

faeReview.author: Jianghai FAE Team
faeReview.content: Snubber capacitors are crucial for IGBT protection. 0.47uF/1200V is a common specification for 1200V IGBT modules. Key is installation position should be as close to IGBT as possible, shorter leads are better. Recommend using in series with 10-22Ohm non-inductive resistors. Note to select capacitors with sufficiently high dv/dt to handle fast switching.
faeReview.highlight: High dv/dt 3000V/us, low ESL less than 10nH, effectively suppresses IGBT spikes

faqs.question: How do I select the right snubber capacitor value for my IGBT application?
faqs.answer: Snubber capacitor selection depends on several factors: 1) IGBT switching characteristics - faster switching requires lower ESL; 2) Circuit stray inductance - higher inductance requires larger capacitance; 3) Energy to be absorbed - calculate from L_stray x I^2. For typical 1200V IGBT modules (100-300A), 0.47uF is commonly used. The capacitor must have dv/dt rating exceeding the IGBT's dV/dt (typically 3000-5000V/us). Always include a series resistor (10-22 Ohm) to damp oscillations and limit discharge current.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our FAE team with your IGBT part number and circuit layout for specific snubber recommendations.

faqs.question: Why is low ESL critical for snubber capacitors?
faqs.answer: ESL (Equivalent Series Inductance) is critical in snubber applications because: 1) High ESL limits the capacitor's ability to absorb fast transients - the inductance opposes rapid current change (di/dt); 2) ESL creates additional voltage spikes (V = L x di/dt) that add to the IGBT turn-off spike; 3) ESL causes ringing and oscillations in the snubber circuit itself. Jianghai snubber capacitors have ESL less than 10nH achieved through special internal construction and flat terminal design. Mounting with short, wide connections is equally important.
faqs.decisionGuide: Always minimize loop inductance in snubber circuits. Use short, wide traces or busbars, and place capacitor as close as possible to IGBT terminals.

alternativeParts.comparison: Smaller capacitance, suitable for smaller power IGBT

alternativeParts.reason: Large current IGBT modules, larger spike energy

recommendedCompanionParts.description: Low-inductance snubber resistor for RC snubber circuit, damps oscillations
600V/15A fast recovery diode for freewheeling protection, 35ns reverse recovery
Dual-channel IGBT driver with protection features, +15V/-8V gate drive voltage

categories.name: Supercapacitors
categories.description: EDLC electric double layer capacitors and lithium-ion capacitors
categories.longDescription: Jianghai supercapacitors include EDLC electric double layer capacitors and lithium-ion capacitors. EDLC features ultra-high power density (up to 10kW/kg), ultra-long cycle life (500,000+ cycles), and fast charge/discharge (seconds). Lithium-ion capacitors combine high energy density of lithium batteries with high power density of supercapacitors. Products widely used in smart meters, rail transit, new energy vehicles, industrial equipment, and more. As an authorized distributor, we provide comprehensive Supercapacitors selection guidance (选型指导) and application support.
categories.selectionGuide: For supercapacitor selection: Working voltage determines series quantity, capacitance calculated based on energy or power requirements, ESR affects power output and efficiency, cycle life must meet application requirements, temperature range must match working environment.

products.shortDescription: Jianghai EDLC supercapacitor, 300F/2.7V, cylindrical, high power density, long cycle life.
descriptionParagraphs: Jianghai EDLC 300F/2.7V is an electric double layer supercapacitor using activated carbon electrodes and organic electrolyte, featuring ultra-high power density and ultra-long cycle life. Cylindrical aluminum case, size 35mm (diameter) x 60mm (height).

Product rated voltage 2.7V, nominal capacitance 300F, ESR approximately 3.5mOhm, max peak current up to 200A, leakage current approximately 0.5mA. Cycle life over 500,000 cycles (25C), operating temperature range -40C to +65C, power density up to 8kW/kg.

Widely used in smart meter power-fail protection, rail transit energy recovery, crane potential energy recovery, automotive start-stop systems. Compared to batteries, supercapacitors have fast charge/discharge speed, long cycle life, wide temperature range, and maintenance-free advantages.

faeReview.author: Jianghai FAE Team
faeReview.content: EDLC 300F/2.7V is Jianghai's main specification, performing excellently in smart meters and industrial applications. 300F capacitance can support meters working 2-3 minutes after power failure to complete data saving. Recommend configuring balancing circuits when using in series to prevent overvoltage damage. Note that supercapacitors have relatively fast self-discharge, not suitable for long-term energy storage applications.
faeReview.highlight: 500,000 cycle life, 200A peak current, suitable for high-power pulse applications

faqs.question: How do I calculate the backup time for EDLC 300F/2.7V in my application?
faqs.answer: Backup time calculation for supercapacitors uses the formula: t = C x (V_max^2 - V_min^2) / (2 x P), where C is capacitance (300F), V_max is starting voltage (2.7V), V_min is minimum operating voltage, and P is power consumption. For example, with 5V system using 2 cells in series (5.4V), minimum 3.0V, and 100mA at 5V (0.5W): t = 300 x (5.4^2 - 3.0^2) / (2 x 0.5) = 300 x (29.16 - 9) / 1 = 6048 seconds (about 100 minutes). For constant current discharge: t = C x (V_max - V_min) / I.
faqs.decisionGuide: Use our supercapacitor sizing calculator or contact FAE for precise backup time calculations based on your specific load profile.

faqs.question: Why is cell balancing necessary when using EDLC 300F/2.7V in series?
faqs.answer: Cell balancing is essential for series-connected supercapacitors because: 1) Capacitance and leakage current variations between cells cause voltage imbalance during charging; 2) Without balancing, one cell may exceed its 2.7V rated voltage while others are undercharged; 3) Overvoltage damages the supercapacitor by decomposing the electrolyte. For 300F/2.7V cells, use active balancing ICs (recommended for >3 cells) or passive balancing resistors (100-500 Ohm per cell). Balancing ensures equal voltage distribution and maximizes usable energy storage.
faqs.decisionGuide: Always implement cell balancing for series configurations. Active balancing is recommended for systems with 4+ cells or high-reliability requirements.

faqs.question: What is the self-discharge rate of EDLC 300F/2.7V and how does it affect my design?
faqs.answer: EDLC 300F/2.7V has a typical self-discharge rate of 5-20% per day depending on temperature and initial voltage. The self-discharge follows a logarithmic curve - fastest in the first hours after charging. At 25C, voltage may drop from 2.7V to 2.4V in 24 hours without load. This characteristic makes supercapacitors unsuitable for long-term backup (days/weeks) but ideal for short-term backup (minutes/hours) and pulse power applications. For designs requiring longer backup times, consider: 1) Periodic topping charge; 2) Larger capacitance; 3) Hybrid battery-supercapacitor systems.
faqs.decisionGuide: Consider self-discharge in your backup time calculations. For backup requirements exceeding 24 hours, evaluate hybrid energy storage solutions.

recommendedCompanionParts.description: Active cell balancing IC for series supercapacitor configurations, prevents overvoltage
Energy harvesting regulator with supercapacitor charging, efficient power management
Supercapacitor pack manager with monitoring and protection features

products.name: Supercapacitors EDLC 300F/2.7V

products.shortDescription: Jianghai lithium-ion capacitor, 220F/3.8V, high energy density, wide operating temperature range.
descriptionParagraphs: Jianghai lithium-ion capacitors (LIC) combine high energy density of lithium batteries with high power density of supercapacitors. Positive electrode uses activated carbon, negative electrode uses pre-lithiated carbon material, working voltage 1.8V-3.8V.

Product rated voltage 3.8V, nominal capacitance 220F, ESR approximately 15mOhm, max peak current approximately 50A. Energy density is 3-4x higher than EDLC, cycle life over 100,000 cycles, operating temperature range -40C to +65C, self-discharge rate lower than EDLC.

Suitable for applications requiring higher energy density than EDLC but higher power density than lithium batteries, such as wearable devices, IoT sensors, industrial equipment backup power. Supports fast charging, 10 minutes to 80% capacity.

faeReview.author: Jianghai FAE Team
faeReview.content: Lithium-ion capacitors are Jianghai's new products, filling the gap between EDLC and lithium batteries. 220F/3.8V is suitable for 3.3V system applications, single cell can meet requirements (EDLC requires two in series). Note working voltage must not exceed 3.8V, minimum not below 1.8V, requires dedicated management IC.
faeReview.highlight: Energy density 3-4x higher than EDLC, single cell 3.8V suitable for 3.3V systems

faqs.question: What are the key differences between LIC 220F/3.8V and EDLC supercapacitors?
faqs.answer: LIC (Lithium-Ion Capacitor) differs from EDLC in several key aspects: 1) Voltage - LIC operates at 3.8V vs EDLC at 2.7V, enabling single-cell 3.3V designs; 2) Energy density - LIC offers 3-4x higher energy density (10-15 Wh/kg vs 3-5 Wh/kg); 3) Self-discharge - LIC has lower self-discharge rate (2-5% per day vs 5-20% for EDLC); 4) Cycle life - LIC provides 100,000+ cycles vs 500,000+ for EDLC; 5) ESR - LIC typically has higher ESR (15mOhm vs 3.5mOhm). LIC bridges the gap between batteries and supercapacitors, ideal for applications needing moderate energy storage with high cycle life.
faqs.decisionGuide: Choose LIC for 3.3V systems requiring higher energy density and lower self-discharge. Choose EDLC for highest cycle life and lowest ESR applications.

faqs.question: What are the voltage management requirements for LIC 220F/3.8V?
faqs.answer: LIC 220F/3.8V requires careful voltage management: 1) Absolute maximum voltage: 3.8V (exceeding causes permanent damage); 2) Minimum voltage: 1.8V (discharging below reduces cycle life); 3) Recommended operating range: 2.5V-3.8V for optimal performance; 4) Requires dedicated LIC management IC for charging control; 5) Unlike EDLC, LIC cannot be used in series without specialized balancing. Use a dedicated LIC charger IC (e.g., BQ25100) that limits charge voltage precisely to 3.8V with proper taper current control.
faqs.decisionGuide: Always use dedicated LIC management ICs. Never exceed 3.8V or discharge below 1.8V to ensure safety and longevity.
